title: Leiden, South Holland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Leiden, South Holland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Leiden is a city in South Holland with a population of 130,108. A picturesque university town famous for its canals, historic ties to the Pilgrims, and a relaxed, intellectual atmosphere close to The Hague and Amsterdam.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
